design: docs/specs/replay-corpus.md + replay-run.md (both amended 2026-07-19 — blind protocol, formatting/verbatim/keyword-label guards)
note: v2 re-mine with the guarded miner: 1 ground-truth task survives (axios buildFullPath). The corpus target (>=3 tasks across >=2 repos) is missed again, now with guards on: most candidates die under scrutiny — the v1 isObject/forEach tasks were prettier artifacts (formatting guard kills them), the sole deep-vite candidate had a keyword label (type) with syntax-matching "evidence" (rejected by hand, now the P6 guard), and javapoet/RestSharp floor at caller-file density (and javapoet/vite clones were SHALLOW — 201 commits — which, not quiet history, explains their v1 emptiness; vite was deepened to 2,731 for v2). True mineable caller-breakages are rare; the one that survives is fully verified. Decided pre-solve: corpus <=2 tasks -> full grid runs 4 reps per arm (amended replay-run spec).
minerProvenance: axios/vite/javapoet funnels mined at commit 0261024 (pre keyword-label guard — no candidate in them was keyword-labeled except the vite type task, recorded rejected below); RestSharp mined with the final guard (distinctiveLabel stage visible). Task content is identical under both.

handVerification.axios buildFullPath: ACCEPTED. Change 32c7bcc adds the allowAbsoluteUrls param. Both missed callers have semantic historical fixes verified by reading the diffs: fb8eec2 (#6810) passes it in lib/adapters/http.js; ec159e5 (#6814) passes it via lib/helpers/resolveConfig.js for xhr/fetch.
handVerification.vite ModuleNode.type: REJECTED. Follow-up 62b3e0d9 is an unrelated hostname/preview fix; it matches \btype\b only via import-type syntax lines. Root cause of admission: keyword label — now guarded (P6).

tasks.label: buildFullPath
tasks.criterion: every file that uses the changed signature compiles/behaves against the new shape; graded on (a) coverage of the historically-missed caller files and (b) zero structural regressions (diff.mjs gate)
